clip_prompt: a brutalist architectural scene emphasizing raw concrete, exposed material texture, tectonic detail, and heavy surfaces
rule_material: Use raw concrete, board-marked texture, exposed joints, matte finish, and dense shadow contrast.
rule_massing: Keep overall forms simple and weighty, with a few large masses instead of many small pieces.
rule_openings: Use limited apertures with deep reveals so material depth stays dominant.
rule_structure: Express structural seams, cast lines, and thick wall edges rather than lightweight framing.
rule_animation: Animate through slow material transitions, roughness shifts, and gradual thickening of surfaces.

clip_prompt: a dense brutalist urban scene with housing blocks, circulation links, shared platforms, and collective occupation
rule_material: Use repeated concrete modules with occasional color accents to mark activity or public use.
rule_massing: Create dense aggregations of smaller block units, stacked terraces, and linked platforms.
rule_openings: Use many small openings, bridges, and connectors to suggest collective access.
rule_structure: Organize fragments as repeated modular units in clusters or networks.
rule_animation: Animate by increasing density, multiplying modules, and spreading fragments through the site like urban growth.

clip_prompt: a pavilion-like brutalist structure with exposed frame, panel systems, galleries, and open structural assembly
rule_material: Use concrete combined with steel or panel infill, highlighting contrast between frame and enclosure.
rule_massing: Favor lighter masses composed of frames, shells, canopies, and partially enclosed volumes.
rule_openings: Use open edges, screened panels, and layered skins instead of only carved solid voids.
rule_structure: Make beams, columns, ribs, and panel grids clearly legible as a spatial system.
rule_animation: Animate by assembling the frame first, then sliding or attaching panel layers over time.

clip_prompt: a brutalist spatial sequence with courtyards, deep thresholds, framed views, processional circulation, and exhibition-like atmosphere
rule_material: Use consistent concrete surfaces with selective stone or dark metal inserts to accent thresholds.
rule_massing: Carve internal voids and nested volumes instead of relying only on external mass.
rule_openings: Create framed openings, courtyards, ramps, and compressed-to-expanded spatial moments.
rule_structure: Use walls and floor plates to choreograph movement more than a fully exposed frame.
rule_animation: Animate through camera procession, opening/closing courtyards, and sequential void carving.

clip_prompt: a monumental brutalist building with monolithic concrete blocks, heavy walls, deep openings, and civic scale
rule_material: Use heavy concrete, weathered surfaces, and monumental material continuity across all pieces.
rule_massing: Generate large block extrusions, stepped slabs, podiums, and thick wall fragments.
rule_openings: Keep openings sparse but deep, emphasizing thickness and contrast between solid and void.
rule_structure: Use a hidden or embedded structure so mass and monumentality read first.
rule_animation: Animate by scaling blocks, shifting stacked masses, and revealing deep voids from solid volumes.
